refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall support achieving the customer-defined cycle time target for the load→travel→dump cycle.
refined_fr.rationale: The candidate FR specifies a single functional obligation: to support achieving a defined cycle time target for a specific operational cycle. It is already focused on what the system must do (support achieving the cycle time target) without specifying how, thus it is solution-neutral and atomic.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure the cycle time for the load→travel→dump cycle under the agreed duty cycle and site conditions, and verify that the 95th percentile (p95) cycle time is less than or equal to the customer-defined target.
sub_frs: The NGHE solution shall support achieving the customer-defined cycle time target for the load→travel→dump cycle.

candidate_dps: Optimize load mechanism speed and efficiency
Optimize dump mechanism speed and efficiency
Coordinate load, travel, and dump operations to minimize idle time
Implement cycle time monitoring and adaptive control to meet target
selected_dp.selected_dp: Coordinate load, travel, and dump operations to minimize idle time

potential_sources: Interdependence between load, travel, and dump phases timing
coupling_check.notes: Selecting coordination as the DP focuses on minimizing idle time between phases, which supports independence by treating each phase as a modular operation while ensuring overall cycle time target is met.

assumptions_risks: Assumes that load, travel, and dump mechanisms can be controlled independently
Risk that external site conditions may affect travel speed unpredictably
Assumes accurate cycle time measurement and control capability
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider explicitly including adaptive control mechanisms in the DP to handle variability in site conditions and maintain cycle time target under real-world disturbances.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: The NGHE Solution module encompasses the overall system coordination logic, including scheduling and sequencing of load, travel, and dump operations to minimize idle time.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives vehicle status and sends operation progress updates.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Sends coordinated operation commands to Vehicle and Teleoperation modules.

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Receives safety alerts to adjust operation coordination accordingly.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Facilitates communication between distributed modules and external systems.

module_containment_scores.notes: Highly cohesive as it centralizes coordination logic; minimal diffusion since it interfaces with other modules via defined interfaces.
Vehicle module focuses on physical operation execution; coordination logic would be diffused across multiple vehicles and external modules.
Teleoperation handles remote control aspects, not overall operation coordination; would cause high diffusion.
Safety Services focus on safety monitoring and alerts, not operation coordination; poor containment.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: The NGHE Solution module is the most appropriate boundary for containing the DP as it centralizes the coordination of load, travel, and dump operations, minimizing idle time with minimal diffusion to other modules.
containment_risks: Potential complexity growth in NGHE Solution if coordination logic becomes too detailed.
Dependency on timely and reliable interfaces (Telemetry, Tasking) to Vehicle and Teleoperation modules.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The DP logically addresses the FR by specifying coordination of load, travel, and dump operations to minimize idle time, which directly supports achieving the customer-defined cycle time target.

diffusion_risks: Dependency on timely and reliable interfaces (Telemetry, Tasking) to Vehicle and Teleoperation modules may cause diffusion if coordination logic spreads outside NGHE Solution.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: The NGHE Solution module centralizes the coordination logic with high containment (score 9) and minimal diffusion (score 1), indicating good architectural packaging of the DP within a single IM boundary.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification is feasible through measuring the cycle time p95 against the CT_target under agreed duty cycle and site conditions, as well as monitoring adherence to worksite safety plans and operational policies.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: The allocation of the FR to the NGHE Solution IM is clear, as it owns the coordination logic and interfaces with other modules to realize the DP.

recommended_revisions: Monitor complexity growth within the NGHE Solution module to avoid overloading a single module with detailed coordination logic.
Ensure robust and low-latency communication on Telemetry and Tasking interfaces to prevent diffusion of coordination logic into Vehicle and Teleoperation modules.
Consider modularizing coordination sub-functions within NGHE Solution if complexity increases to maintain high cohesion and low diffusion.

decision.justification: Although the current FR, DP, and IM mappings pass all gates with good containment and verification feasibility, the high safety criticality and noted risks of complexity growth and interface dependency warrant further decomposition. Deriving next-level sub-FRs will help manage complexity, improve modularity, and ensure robust verification and safety compliance by breaking down the coordination logic into manageable, verifiable sub-functions.

assumptions: The NGHE Solution module currently centralizes coordination logic with high containment.
Interfaces (Telemetry, Tasking) are reliable but pose diffusion risks if coordination logic spreads outside the module.
open_risks: Potential complexity growth within NGHE Solution module leading to overloading and diffusion.
Dependency on timely and reliable communication interfaces may cause diffusion of coordination logic.
High safety criticality requires rigorous verification and modularization.
evidence_needed: Performance data on cycle time p95 under operational conditions.
Monitoring reports on interface latency and reliability.
Complexity metrics within NGHE Solution module over time.
